verses.1: The LORD reigns, He is clothed with majesty; The LORD has clothed and encircled Himself with strength. Indeed, the world is firmly established; it will not be moved.
verses.2: Your throne is established from of old; You are from eternity.
verses.3: The floods have lifted up, LORD, The floods have lifted up their voice, The floods lift up their pounding waves.
verses.4: More than the sounds of many waters, Than the mighty breakers of the sea, The LORD on high is mighty.
verses.5: Your testimonies are fully confirmed; Holiness is pleasing to Your house, LORD, forevermore.
